proposal_summary: This proposal establishes a transparent, community-driven token-weighted approval voting process to elect two DUNA Admins (one Admin, one Reserve) via an off-chain vote on Nouns.gg, which will subsequently be finalized through an on-chain vote.

disclosed_entities.name: Nouns.gg
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: voting on Nouns.gg, achieved with Arweave

disclosed_entities.name: Arweave
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Preserves History by archiving submissions with Arweave

claimed_actions.raw_action: Approve the DUNA Admin election structure and authorize the preliminary voting round.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Establishes a formal, 4+ week election process including warming-up, off-chain voting on Nouns.gg, and on-chain finalization.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: A 'For' vote approves this election structure and authorizes conducting the preliminary voting round on Nouns.gg.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal defines a governance process and framework with off-chain steps leading to a future on-chain ratification vote. It contains no technical payload or smart contract interactions.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: This proposal establishes a transparent, community-driven election process... followed by on-chain finalization.

limitations: The proposal does not contain any executable on-chain payload, addresses, or smart contract function calls. It acts as a signaling or structural governance proposal.
